title: Hostony
body: I was able to confirm, thanks to Google’s **Webmaster Tools**, that the second most common keyword used to find this blog, after *xarop*, is [***hostony***](http://www.xarop.com/?s=hostony). And I wanted to take this opportunity to write this new post on the subject, basically to reiterate that **I’m not very happy with this American web hosting company**. Although the service is, on the surface, very good (good price, large hard drive capacity and bandwidth, a very comprehensive control panel (cPanel), and fast, effective technical support), they have never provided a solution to the sometimes exasperating slowness of the sites I host there ([esquizo.com](http://www.esquizo.com "Schizophrenia and Mental Health"), [casisi.com](http://www.casisi.com "Texas Hold'em")).
